title: Today while on the train to meet my sister for a drink I had a 2 minutes conversation with some random strangers, dad and son
description: Today while on the train to meet my sister for a drink I had a 2 minutes conversation with some random strangers, dad and son. And let me tell you something, it was one of the most valuable conversation since a long time. ‘Go out there, enjoy your life, you’re young! Go start your business. Be scared and still do it. And if it doesn’t work out, just start another one. Believe me, I did that so many time.’ Holy Moly, I want them in my life. hahah Best!
